title: AI in Sustainable Agriculture Webinar
agenda: Introduction • AI for Sustainable Farming • Machine Learning Case Studies • Interactive Q&A
speakers: Dr. Michael Otieno, Prof. Anne Njeri

title: BRIDGE-AI Digital Agriculture Conference 2026
agenda: Keynote Addresses • Research Presentations • AI Demonstrations • Startup Showcase • Closing Ceremony
speakers: Prof. Esther Maina, Dr. Kevin Ouma, Dr. Peter Ochieng
post_event_report: The conference attracted over 480 participants from universities, government agencies, startups, NGOs, and private sector organizations. Live demonstrations showcased AI-powered farming technologies, precision irrigation systems, and smart mushroom production. Several partnerships were initiated to support collaborative research and technology adoption.
feedback_summary: Average participant rating: 4.8/5. Participants praised the practical demonstrations, expert presentations, networking opportunities, and requested more hands-on training sessions in future events.

title: Women in Digital Agriculture Innovation Forum
agenda: Opening Ceremony • Women Entrepreneurs Panel • AI Solutions Showcase • Funding Opportunities • Networking Session
speakers: Dr. Susan Njeri, Ms. Grace Wanjiku

title: BRIDGE-AI Kenya Digital Agriculture Conference 2026
agenda: Opening Ceremony • Keynote Speeches • Research Presentations • Startup Showcase • AI Demonstrations • Panel Discussions • Closing Ceremony.
speakers: Prof. Esther Maina, Dr. Kevin Ouma, Dr. Peter Ochieng, Ms. Faith Wambui
